---
title: "Digital literacy: Data preparation"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  message: false
---

**Task**: Deidentifies and saves data for replication

# Setup

```{r}
#| label: data-setup-packages

# Load packages
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, haven, knitr)
```

# Paths and labels

```{r}
#| label: data-paths-and-labels

# This file requires access to full data
data_path <- "../../1_Projects/Covid Vaccine Allocation/4_data/"

pref_var <- "party_preference_"   

v_datapaths <- c(
  "wave_9"  = paste0(data_path, "wave_9/Full-Launch/Video_reshaped.dta"),
  "wave_10" = paste0(data_path, "wave_10/Video_reshaped.dta")
)

# Edit figure labels here
strategies <- 
  c("political\n(emotional)", "political\n(neutral)")

ps <- tibble(
  parties = c("AfD", "BSW", "CDU/CSU", "FDP", "Grüne", "Linke", "SPD"),
  party_stub = c("afd", "bsw", "cdu", "fdp", "gruene", "linke", "spd")
)
```

# Helper functions


```{r}
#| label: data-helper-functions

prepare_data <- function(D) {
  df <- read_dta(v_datapaths[D]) |>
    # Keeping ID which is used for linking periods but no PII
    # Dropping long text fields
    select(-any_of(c("USER", "record", 
                     "videoCurrentTimep1r", "video_desc"))) |>
    filter(SwitchedToRandom == 1) |>
    filter(!duration_video_ %in% c(-9, NA)) |>
    mutate(
      workshop_Treatment = ifelse(workshop_Treatment == 2, 0, as.numeric(workshop_Treatment)),
      strategy_2 = case_when(
        content == "entertainment" ~ "entertainment",
        strategy == "neutral" ~ strategies[2],
        strategy %in% c("anger", "fear", "superiority") ~ strategies[1]
      ),
      party = party |> str_replace("_", "/"),
      partisan = NA
    ) |>
    group_by(ID) |>
    mutate(number_video = n()) |>
    ungroup() |>
    filter(number_video >= 2)

  # Construct partisanship variable
  for (p in 1:nrow(ps)) {
    df <- df |>
      mutate(
        partisan = ifelse(
          party == ps$parties[p],
          case_when(
            # Strong / weak self reported identification
            !!sym(paste0(pref_var, ps$party_stub[p])) == 1 ~ 1,
            TRUE ~ 0
          ),
          partisan
        )
      )
  }

  df
}

```


# Prepare and export data 

This prepares the short-term (wave_9) and long-term (wave_10) datasets a single time.

```{r}
#| label: dataprep
prepare_data("wave_9") |> write_rds("data/wave_9.rds")
prepare_data("wave_10") |> write_rds("data/wave_10.rds")

```


# Retain video descriptions

400 videos 

```{r}
#| label: data-retain-video-descriptions

labels_df <- 
  bind_rows(
    read_dta(v_datapaths[1]) |> select(tiktok_id, video_desc) |> distinct(),
    read_dta(v_datapaths[2]) |> select(tiktok_id, video_desc) |> distinct()) |>
  distinct()

labels_df |> head() |> kable()

```
